input: How many properties do we have per client for the current tax year?
query: SELECT c.client_name, p.tax_year, COUNT(p.property_id) AS property_count FROM properties p JOIN clients c ON c.client_id = p.client_id WHERE p.tax_year = 2025 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY c.client_name, p.tax_year ORDER BY property_count DESC;

metadata.description: Counts properties per client for a given tax year.

input: What are the total taxable values and tax amounts by client for 2025?
query: SELECT c.client_name, SUM(pv.taxable_value) AS total_taxable_value, SUM(pv.tax_due) AS total_tax_due FROM property_values pv JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = pv.property_id JOIN clients c ON c.client_id = p.client_id WHERE pv.tax_year = 2025 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY c.client_name ORDER BY total_tax_due DESC;

metadata.description: Aggregates taxable value and tax due by client for a tax year.

input: Which properties have missing tax values for 2025?
query: SELECT p.property_id, p.lease_name, c.client_name, pv.tax_year FROM properties p JOIN clients c ON c.client_id = p.client_id LEFT JOIN property_values pv ON pv.property_id = p.property_id AND pv.tax_year = 2025 WHERE pv.taxable_value IS NULL AND p.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY c.client_name;

metadata.description: Lists properties with no taxable value recorded for the given year.

input: Show tax savings (difference between initial and revised tax) by client for 2025.
query: SELECT c.client_name, SUM(pv.initial_tax_due - pv.revised_tax_due) AS tax_savings FROM property_values pv JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = pv.property_id JOIN clients c ON c.client_id = p.client_id WHERE pv.tax_year = 2025 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY c.client_name HAVING SUM(pv.initial_tax_due - pv.revised_tax_due) > 0 ORDER BY tax_savings DESC;

metadata.description: Computes tax savings from initial vs revised tax amounts per client.

input: List the top 10 clients by total tax due in 2025.
query: SELECT c.client_name, SUM(pv.tax_due) AS total_tax_due FROM property_values pv JOIN properties p ON p.property_id = pv.property_id JOIN clients c ON c.client_id = p.client_id WHERE pv.tax_year = 2025 AND p.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY c.client_name ORDER BY total_tax_due DESC LIMIT 10;

metadata.description: Ranking of clients by total tax due for a given year.
